creator: freebsd-ports@varju.ca
text:
Based on the error in the log, it almost looks like there was a problem 
applying the patch.  The error indicates it is trying to package files 
which the patch removes from pkg-plist.

In case it is a patch problem, here is a tarred up copy of www/gallery2 
from my system:

   http://www.varju.ca/alex/freebsd/gallery2-2.2.tgz

This was made from /usr/ports, so it includes www/gallery2 in the file 
paths.

Alex.
